text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
One, two, three, four... And I'm done stretching! I
feel really motivated today!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Did you know? Maruzen and I actually went out
together yesterday!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
We laughed and cried at the movies! Then we
relaxed in the aquarium!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
She even patted my head and said that she really
likes seeing me smile! Hehe...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
All right! I'm ready to do my best today! You'll
never know what's groovy if you don't hang ten,
you know!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It sounds like Sakura Chiyono O had a very
fulfilling day off!
